task: Frontend Batch 5 - AI Failure and Partial Failure UI Reinforcement
scope: frontend AI failure and partial-failure UI tests with minimal frontend fixes
testsAddedOrReinforced: AIFixDialog runtime config failure, malformed config, empty provider fallback, POST 504/500, retry, and work enrich failure/retry component tests
AdminBlogBatchAiPanel runtime fallback, mixed succeeded/failed item rendering, partial apply failure, cancel failure, remove failure, and retry-safe component tests
Route-mocked Playwright blog AI failure/retry and work enrich failure-to-success tests

productionFilesChanged.reason: Report partial apply responses with failed items as partial failures instead of full success.

harnessFilesChanged.reason: Allow explicitly requested optional specs to run under the forced core test:e2e profile.

behaviorBugsFound.summary: Batch partial apply could show a full-success toast even when failed items remained.
behaviorBugsFound.rootCause: applyJobResults treated every successful HTTP response as full UI success without checking failedCount, item failed status, or item errors.
behaviorBugsFound.fix: Inspect the returned job and show a partial-failure error toast when failed items remain.

harnessIssuesFound.summary: Explicitly named optional batch AI specs were ignored by npm run test:e2e.
harnessIssuesFound.rootCause: The npm script forces PLAYWRIGHT_E2E_PROFILE=core and the config still applied optional spec ignores to explicitly requested optional files.
harnessIssuesFound.fix: Disable optional ignores when process argv explicitly requests an optional spec path.

validations.details: RED: partial apply did not show partial-failure toast

validations.command: PLAYWRIGHT_EXTERNAL_SERVER=1 PLAYWRIGHT_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3000 npm run test:e2e -- tests/admin-blog-ai-dialog.spec.ts tests/admin-ai-batch-jobs.spec.ts tests/admin-ai-batch-cancel.spec.ts
